label: Fixes & improvements
items: Garden Walk now fills the whole screen on tablets too — the app menu and profile buttons no longer overlap the plant's header.
Garden Walk now groups several plants of the same type in the same bed into a single card, with each plant listed inside — snap or note against whichever plant(s) you mean.
The calendar now clearly marks a task completed late on its original due day (amber tick), and shows the actual date you finished it.
The Home dashboard now reads "X of Y done today" with a breakdown (to do / skipped / postponed) and refreshes correctly after a Garden Walk.
Logging a partial harvest across several plants now records the amount you entered as the task total, instead of multiplying it by the number of plants.
